author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings 

Naabathon Winners

Hey everyone, thank you so much for your participation in the first ever Star Atlas hackathon! We love supporting and enabling co-creation around Star Atlas and we hope you enjoyed participating. Here are the winners:

Best Project Award: Atom by meta_arion who won 10,000 USDC, 3,000,000 ATLAS and an Ogrika Sunpaa!

Galactic Marketplace Award:  Atlas Link by harshh.16 and sidh1999 who won 2,500 USDC, 1,500,000 ATLAS and an Ogrika Tursic!

Defi Award: Squads.io - StarAtlasLocker by .solwalker who won 2,500 USDC, 1,500,000 ATLAS and an Ogrika Tursic!

Data Award: Star Atlas Crew Dashboard by Aephia Viktor Link who won 2,500 USDC, 1,500,000 ATLAS and an Ogrika Tursic!

Resources Award: Star Atlas Dispatcher by Teykarat who won 2,500 USDC, 1,500,000 ATLAS and an Ogrika Tursic!

Game Award: Warfront Invasion by visualjc who won 2,500 USDC, 1,500,000 ATLAS and an Ogrika Tursic!

Star Atlas: Golden Era Award: Eveeye Ship Comparison and Viewer who won 2,500 USDC, 1,500,000 ATLAS and an Ogrika Tursic! Link

If you're interested in learning more about these hackathon submissions, be sure to join us for next week's Atlas Brew, where we’ll showcase and discuss the entries!
